response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for a staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack versatility with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core required technologies
Career gap since Oct 2025 and recent role at re:cinq is only 7 months — raises questions about continuity and depth in GenAI
Lacks documented experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers or mentoring at staff level
